parameters.command:
set -e
NOW="$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"
{
  echo "GATEWAY_AUDIT_START"
  echo "checked_at=$NOW"
  echo "--- OPENCLAW VERSION ---"
  openclaw --version 2>/dev/null || true
  echo "--- GATEWAY STATUS ---"
  openclaw gateway status 2>/dev/null || true
  echo "--- LISTENERS ---"
  ss -ltnp 2>/dev/null | grep -E ':(18789|18791) ' || true
  echo "--- CADDY ---"
  systemctl is-active caddy 2>/dev/null || true
  systemctl is-enabled caddy 2>/dev/null || true
}
